Resume Maker
Primary URL: https://resume.batturaj.in/

Resume Maker is a web app for creating, editing, scoring, and optimizing resumes.

Key capabilities:
- AI resume parsing from pasted text or PDF uploads
- ATS score analysis against a job description
- AI-assisted resume optimization
- Live resume editing and preview
- PDF and DOCX export
- Cover letter generation

Audience:
- Students
- Fresh graduates
- Job seekers
- Professionals improving ATS compatibility

Preferred landing page:
https://resume.batturaj.in/
